# Rental Agency Finder
> The first European-wide directory for finding, comparing, and reviewing rental agencies.

Rental Agency Finder helps tenants find trustworthy rental agencies across 36 European countries and 64 cities. Unlike property listing sites (Airbnb, Booking.com, Flatio), we focus on the agencies themselves. Users can browse 4,253 agencies by country, city, and rental type (short-term, mid-term, long-term), read reviews from real tenants, and access contact details.

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://www.rentalagencyfinder.com/
- Browse agencies: https://www.rentalagencyfinder.com/agencies/
- For agencies (pricing): https://www.rentalagencyfinder.com/for-agencies/
- Blog: https://www.rentalagencyfinder.com/blog/
- About: https://www.rentalagencyfinder.com/about/
- Contact: https://www.rentalagencyfinder.com/contact/

## Coverage
- 36 European countries
- 64 cities
- 4,253 rental agency listings
- 51 blog posts (city guides, country guides, niche audience guides, and a comprehensive European rental guide)
- Structured FAQs for 19 major cities with FAQPage schema
- Sort by rating, name, or reviews; filter by rental type

## Blog content
- 1 comprehensive European rental agency guide
- 19 city-specific guides (Barcelona, Berlin, Lisbon, Paris, Amsterdam, Rome, Athens, Madrid, Prague, London, Dublin, Vienna, Budapest, Stockholm, Copenhagen, Brussels, Zurich, Helsinki, Edinburgh)
- 10 country-level rental market guides (Germany, France, Spain, Italy, Portugal, Netherlands, Greece, Austria, Sweden, Switzerland)
- 21 niche audience guides (student housing, digital nomad rentals, expat relocation, pet-friendly rentals, furnished apartments, family rentals, seasonal rentals, corporate housing, accessible rentals, luxury rentals, co-living spaces, retirement housing, budget rentals, remote work visa rentals, short-stay Airbnb alternatives, relocation services, renting without credit history, mid-term rentals, renting as a couple, utility setup, rental scam prevention)

## Countries covered
Spain, Portugal, Italy, Greece, France, Germany, Netherlands, United Kingdom, Ireland, Belgium, Austria, Switzerland, Czech Republic, Poland, Hungary, Croatia, Slovenia, Malta, Cyprus, Sweden, Denmark, Norway, Finland, Estonia, Latvia, Lithuania, Romania, Bulgaria, Slovakia, Luxembourg, Iceland, Serbia, Montenegro, Albania, North Macedonia, Turkey.

## For agencies
Rental agencies can list for free or subscribe to paid plans (Starter EUR 29/mo, Advanced EUR 79/mo, Pro EUR 199/mo) for featured placement, verified badges, referral leads, and blog coverage.

## Contact
info@rentalagencyfinder.com
